description_long: This is a modern black and white police car, modeled after a typical American sedan used by law enforcement agencies. The vehicle features a streamlined body with four doors, a prominent front grille guard, and a roof-mounted light bar with red, blue, and white emergency lights. The sides of the car display bold 'POLICE DEPARTMENT' text in white, along with a black-and-white color scheme and subtle checkered patterns on the rear. The rear window and trunk area are marked with additional police identifiers, including a large 'POLICE' label and a checkered stripe. The car is equipped with standard police wheels, side mirrors, and visible interior seating, suggesting functionality for patrol and pursuit in urban environments.
description: A black and white police sedan with a roof light bar, bold 'POLICE DEPARTMENT' markings, and checkered rear patterns, designed for law enforcement use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'POLICE DEPARTMENT' text, black-and-white color split, and roof-mounted light bar.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the checkered pattern, large 'POLICE' label, and rear license plate.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the 'POLICE DEPARTMENT' text and color scheme, with clear visibility of the light bar.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the grille guard, headlights, and the roof light bar from the front perspective.
attribute_police_markings: White 'POLICE DEPARTMENT' text on both side doors, large 'POLICE' label on the rear trunk, black-and-white color split along the body, and a black-and-white checkered stripe on the rear. The markings are bold and highly visible, with white text on black background and vice versa.
attribute_emergency_lights: Roof-mounted light bar with red, blue, and white lights arranged in a rectangular bar; additional small lights visible on the rear window shelf.
attribute_license_plate: Rear license plate present, white with black and red markings, located at the center of the rear bumper. The plate includes a checkered pattern and the word 'POLICE' in red.
